title: Epigenetic orchestration of scar formation: Therapeutic potential of targeting DNA methylation and non‑coding RNAs in cutaneous fibrosis (Review).
snippet: Cutaneous fibrosis is sustained by epigenetic 'memory' rather than chronic inflammation. DNA hypermethylation, repressive histone marks and non‑coding RNA networks lock dermal fibroblasts into a collagen‑secretory state that can persist years after wounding. Single‑cell methylomes have identified DNA methyltransferase (DNMT)3B as the ke...
